blocks.body: Question Forms ‚Äî Basic patterns for English questions.

{ "title": "10. Short summary", "items": [ "Inversion means the auxiliary verb comes before the subject in a question.", "Yes / No Questions take a yes or no answer.", "Wh-Questions begin with who, what, where, when, why, how.", "Answers to Questions help you build short and full answers.", "Do / Does / Did are used with main verbs in Simple Tenses.", "With to be you simply invert am / is / are / was / were.", "With modals the modal verb comes before the subject: Can you...? Will she...?", "Question Tags and Negative Questions add confirmation, surprise, or expectation.", "Formula ‚Äî Wh-word + Auxiliary + Subject + Main Verb +...?" ] }
